total_training_days.description: Number of days the user completed a workout

longest_run_achieved_km.description: User's longest single run during the plan

best_streak_days.description: All-time best consecutive training day streak

missed_days_recovered.description: Number of times the app successfully rescheduled around missed days

holidays_navigated.description: Number of holidays the plan auto-adjusted around
holidays_navigated.marketing_use: Feature promotion — 'training that fits your life'

schedule_adjustments_made.description: Total plan modifications (reschedules, swaps, deloads triggered)

skill_level_at_start.description: Assessed skill level when plan was created

skill_level_progression.description: If user re-assessed at higher level after completing a plan

total_km_trained_all_users.marketing_use: Community impact — 'Our runners have covered X km together'

avg_plan_completion_rate.marketing_use: Product effectiveness — 'X% of users complete their training plan'

avg_missed_days_per_plan.marketing_use: Realism — 'even with X missed days, Y% still finish their plan'

shareable_achievement_templates: I've run {total_km} km training for my first {race_distance} with [App Name]!
Week {week_number} of {total_weeks} done — {pct_complete}% through my {race_distance} plan!
Just hit my longest run ever: {longest_run_km} km!
My plan adjusted around {holidays_count} holidays and I'm still on track!
From couch to {race_distance} start line in {weeks_trained} weeks!

value_propositions.example: Our plans adapted around 50,000+ holidays and missed days last year
Built on research from 5,200+ runners, not arbitrary rules
X% of our users cross the finish line
From first-time 5K to sub-3 marathon — plans for every level
